POL-396.title: IMPLEMENT: Foreman assignment and bootstrap handoff
POL-396.body:
## Objective

Define how `polaris init` and `polaris adopt` select/create a Foreman and hand interactive setup work to it via a governed setup-bootstrap packet that encodes and enforces approval checkpoints.

## Context

Implements the design from ANALYZE POL-392 (see `smartdocs/raw/pol-392-foreman-assignment-bootstrap-handoff-design.md`). Shared prerequisite for POL-390 and POL-391. Reuses `agent-setup.ts`, `.polaris/roles/foreman.md`, and `src/skill-packet/`.

## Goal

A Foreman assignment helper and a provider-neutral setup-bootstrap packet that the human-facing setup commands use to launch a governed Foreman that stops at every approval checkpoint.

## Scope

* src/skill-packet/generator.ts
* src/skill-packet/types.ts
* src/cli/agent-setup.ts
* src/cli/init.ts
* src/cli/adopt-command.ts
* src/loop/adapters/**

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] A `setup-bootstrap` packet kind generates with active_role Foreman, role_file pointer, and the full approval_checkpoints list.
- [ ] Foreman provider resolves from `execution.providerPolicy.foreman`; prompts if unset.
- [ ] The packet prohibits unapproved canon/doc/instruction/graph-root/source mutation.
- [ ] Packet is provider-neutral; provider specifics stay in adapters.

## Validation

* npm run build
* npx vitest run src/skill-packet src/cli/agent-setup

## Ordering

None (prerequisite for POL-390 and POL-391).

## Non-goals

* Do not replace existing worker dispatch.
* Do not loosen Foreman/Worker boundaries or quiet-mode behavior.

POL-406.title: IMPLEMENT: Foreman assignment and selection during init and adopt
POL-406.body:
## Objective

Add a Foreman resolution/assignment helper used by both `polaris init` and `polaris adopt`.

## Context

First child of POL-396 (design: `smartdocs/raw/pol-392-foreman-assignment-bootstrap-handoff-design.md`). Reuses `agent-setup.ts` role/provider selection and `.polaris/roles/foreman.md`.

## Goal

A helper that resolves the Foreman provider from `execution.providerPolicy.foreman`, prompting once if unset, and returns a Foreman binding for setup.

## Scope

* src/cli/agent-setup.ts

## Acceptance Criteria

* Foreman provider resolves from config when present.
* When unset, the operator is prompted once and the choice persists.
* The binding references `.polaris/roles/foreman.md` (no duplication of role text).

## Validation

* npm run build
* npx vitest run src/cli/agent-setup

## Ordering

* None (first in cluster).

## Non-goals

* Do not build the bootstrap packet yet (next child).

POL-407.title: IMPLEMENT: Foreman setup-bootstrap packet schema and generator
POL-407.body:
## Objective

Add a `setup-bootstrap` packet kind alongside existing skill packets, scoped to Foreman-led setup.

## Context

Second child of POL-396. Extends `src/skill-packet/generator.ts` and `types.ts`; mirrors `generateSkillPacket`.

## Goal

A provider-neutral packet with active_role Foreman, a role_file pointer, authority_boundaries, prohibited_actions, the full approval_checkpoints list, and stop_conditions.

## Scope

* src/skill-packet/generator.ts
* src/skill-packet/types.ts

## Acceptance Criteria

* Generating a `setup-bootstrap` packet for mode init|adopt returns the documented shape.
* approval_checkpoints includes canon, doc-movement, instruction-files, graph-root, route-scaffold, source-mutation.
* prohibited_actions forbids unapproved mutation and direct implementation.

## Validation

* npm run build
* npx vitest run src/skill-packet

## Ordering

* Depends on child 1 (Foreman assignment).

## Non-goals

* Do not wire provider launch yet (next child).

POL-408.title: IMPLEMENT: Provider handoff via execution adapters
POL-408.body:
## Objective

Launch/instruct the assigned Foreman with the setup-bootstrap packet via the existing execution adapters.

## Context

Third child of POL-396. Reuses `execution.providers.<name>` templates and `src/loop/adapters/`. Keeps the packet provider-neutral; provider specifics stay in adapters.

## Goal

`polaris init` and `polaris adopt` hand the bootstrap packet to the Foreman through the configured provider's adapter.

## Scope

* src/loop/adapters/**
* src/cli/init.ts
* src/cli/adopt-command.ts

## Acceptance Criteria

* The Foreman is launched with the bootstrap packet as its instruction source.
* Provider selection comes from config; claude and codex are exercised in tests.
* No provider-specific logic leaks into the packet generator.

## Validation

* npm run build
* npx vitest run src/loop/adapters

## Ordering

* Depends on child 2 (bootstrap packet).

## Non-goals

* Do not replace existing worker dispatch.

POL-409.title: IMPLEMENT: Encode and enforce setup approval checkpoints
POL-409.body:
## Objective

Make the setup approval checkpoints non-optional: the Foreman must halt and surface each gate; it cannot self-approve.

## Context

Fourth child of POL-396. Couples the packet's encoded checkpoints to runtime enforcement.

## Goal

Enforcement that stops the Foreman at each checkpoint and requires an operator approval signal before proceeding.

## Scope

* src/skill-packet/generator.ts
* src/loop/adapters/**

## Acceptance Criteria

* Tests assert the Foreman halts at each checkpoint without operator approval.
* Self-approval is impossible by construction.
* Quiet-mode and Foreman/Worker boundaries are preserved.

## Validation

* npm run build
* npx vitest run src/skill-packet src/loop/adapters

## Ordering

* Depends on child 3 (provider handoff).

## Non-goals

* Do not loosen any existing boundary.
